site.name: Oikos
site.description: Decentralized finance protocol for trading, liquidity, staking, and token launches on BNB Chain

home.title: Dashboard
home.description: Monitor your portfolio, track token prices, and manage your DeFi positions on Oikos

markets.title: Markets
markets.description: Explore all tokens, vaults, and presales available on the Oikos protocol

swap.title: Swap
swap.description: Swap tokens instantly with minimal slippage on the Oikos decentralized exchange

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Open a bash-style session against an Oikos webcontainer

trade.title: Trade {token}
trade.description: Trade {token} on Oikos — live charts, market depth, and instant execution

borrow.title: Borrow
borrow.description: Borrow against your token holdings with self-repaying loans on Oikos

stake.title: Stake
stake.description: Stake your tokens to earn rewards and participate in protocol governance

liquidity.title: Liquidity
liquidity.description: Provide concentrated liquidity and earn fees from trades on the Oikos protocol

dividends.title: Dividends
dividends.description: Claim your token dividends and manage vesting schedules on Oikos

dividendToken.title: {token} Dividends
dividendToken.description: View dividend details, vesting entries, and claim history for {token}

presale.title: {token} Presale
presale.description: Participate in the {token} presale — contribute, track progress, and claim tokens

studio.title: Studio
studio.description: Creator dashboard — manage your tokens, track analytics, and monitor activity

studioToken.title: {token} Studio
studioToken.description: Manage and monitor {token} — analytics, holders, liquidity, and earnings

launchpad.title: Launchpad
launchpad.description: Launch your own token on the Oikos protocol — configure, presale, and deploy

launchpadToken.title: Launchpad — Token Info
launchpadToken.description: Configure your token name, symbol, description, and social links

launchpadPool.title: Launchpad — Pool Config
launchpadPool.description: Set up floor price, total supply, reserve asset, and protocol parameters

launchpadPresale.title: Launchpad — Presale Config
launchpadPresale.description: Configure presale duration, soft cap, and contribution limits

launchpadPreview.title: Launchpad — Preview & Deploy
launchpadPreview.description: Review your token configuration and deploy to the Oikos protocol

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved
